allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter ""Name=''php.exe'' AND CommandLine LIKE ''%telegram%''"" | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }')

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Production deployment: branding fixes, deploy configs, server templates

- Fix social links \(Instagram kadrgo_uz, bot @kadrgobot, channel kadrgo_uz\)
- Fix robots.txt sitemap URL to kadrgo.uz
- Fix LandingPage: blue-50 → brand-50, year 2025→2026, Instagram link
- Fix GeoServiceTest: test rejects invalid columns \(security check\)
- Add deploy configs: nginx laravel-php82 templates, queue worker service
- Update .env.example and .env.production.example with channel username

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix regions rendering: adapt RegionGrid and SearchHero to array API format

The API returns regions as an array of objects [{name, count, cities}],
but RegionGrid and SearchHero expected an Object {region: count}.
Updated both components to iterate over the array correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Nutgram cache: use config value instead of hardcoded ''file''

The TelegramServiceProvider was hardcoded to Cache::store\(''file''\),
ignoring the nutgram.cache config \(which is ''redis'' in production\).
This caused conversation state to be lost in webhook mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
